Generate DEGgo PCA plot

Source: R/visualization.R
plot_pca.Rd

Generate DEGgo PCA plot

Usage

plot_pca(
  dds,
  metadata,
  output_dir = "DEGgo_out",
  filename = "PCA_Plot",
  intgroup = "condition",
  color_by = NULL,
  shape_by = NULL,
  title = "PCA Plot",
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

Arguments

dds

DESeq2 dataset.

metadata

Sample metadata.

output_dir

Output directory.

filename

Output filename without extension.

intgroup

Metadata columns used for PCA coloring/grouping.

color_by

Metadata column used for point color.

shape_by

Metadata column used for point shape.

title

Plot title.

width

Plot width in inches.

height

Plot height in inches.

dpi

Plot resolution.

Value

A list containing the VST object, PCA data, and plot.

On this page
